title: Dino's Pure Client
description: An updated minimal modpack that I daily drive for SMPs & other stuff
body:
# Disclaimer
This modpack was built for me and me only. It's unlikely this modpack will fully support your system  
I just wanted to share what I use to the world

## Description
The "Pure Client" is a project of mine that started with a simple task:  
minimize my usage of 200+ mods to only what is absolutely necessary  

This modpack is mostly built off of [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) and [Optimization](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimizationn), for all the optimization mods & any optifine resource pack mods  

and it was made with a few requirements in mind:
- **Up to date**, these mods should be updated to the newest minecraft version within a reasonable timeframe
- **Performant**, my aging 2020 mid-range pc should be able to run smoothly
- **Functional**, some qol stuff I genuinely can't live without
- **Multiplayer friendly**, don't use qol mods that would border "cheating" in my books (like InvMove & ItemIO)
- **Lightweight**, if It serves no real use I probably don't need it

there are rarely some visual / cosmetic mods (for example essential mod with most of the extra's turned off)  
and some personal (wip) texture packs are in here too
